claim_boundary: Official Graph WaveNet source backbone adapted with a lightweight TEP classification head; not an official Graph WaveNet paper benchmark score.

official_source_compatibility_patch.reason: official source defines Conv1d modules on a 4D [batch, channel, node, time] forward path
official_source_compatibility_patch.replacement: Conv1d modules are replaced with shape-equivalent Conv2d modules and copied weights
